headline: One Year Liberated
summary: While equity markets took a big hit last spring, the S&P 500 made a full recovery by June and is now up solidly over the past year. Read more here.

headline: Rising AI Power Demand And Nuclear Fuel Deal Might Change The Case For Investing In GE Vernova (GEV)
summary: In recent weeks, GE Vernova has secured a long-term nuclear fuel supply extension with Entergy, benefitted from growing AI-driven power demand, and attracted increased attention from major customers and institutional investors as its order backlog has expanded. These developments highlight GE Vernova’s central role in powering data centers and modernizing grids, with index inclusion and strong analyst interest underscoring how critical reliable electricity infrastructure has become.
